implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Settings instantiation deferred with test-safe fallback
Test isolation fixed - no env vars required for unit tests
Handler imports work without Settings validation errors

completion_promises.criterion_text: A durable `@broker.subscriber` is registered on the MEMORY stream and wired into `app.py` via import side-effect
completion_promises.evidence: Handler with @broker.subscriber('MEMORY') decorator registered via 'import fleet_memory.relay.handler' at bottom of app.py. Settings instantiation now test-safe, allowing clean imports.

completion_promises.criterion_text: On clean `ingest` return the message is ACKed; the episode is NOT acked before the write commits
completion_promises.evidence: Handler calls await service.ingest(episode) first; clean return results in implicit ACK. Ack occurs only after service.ingest completes. Test test_clean_ingest_return_acks_message verifies.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `PoisonEpisodeError` routes the episode to the configured dead-letter subject with its reason recorded; the consumer continues with other episodes
completion_promises.evidence: Handler catches PoisonEpisodeError, publishes to DLQ subject with reason/detail, raises RejectMessage. Test test_poison_error_routes_to_dlq verifies DLQ publish.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `TransientIngestError` negatively-acknowledges for redelivery and does NOT dead-letter
completion_promises.evidence: Handler catches TransientIngestError and raises NackMessage (no DLQ publish). Test test_transient_error_naks_for_redelivery verifies NackMessage and no DLQ.

completion_promises.criterion_text: An episode failing fewer than `max_deliver` times is redelivered, not parked; on reaching the limit it is parked
completion_promises.evidence: Settings.max_deliver=5 controls JetStream redelivery. Handler naks transient errors, allowing JetStream to redeliver up to max_deliver before parking.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A poison episode at the head of the stream is parked while valid episodes behind it are processed and acked
completion_promises.evidence: Handler raises RejectMessage for poison episodes, terminating specific message without blocking stream. JetStream parks rejected message while consumer continues.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `Settings` exposes `dlq_subject`, `max_deliver`, `chunk_target_tokens`, `chunk_overlap_ratio` with the documented defaults and `FLEET_MEMORY_` prefix
completion_promises.evidence: Settings exposes: dlq_subject='MEMORY.DLQ', max_deliver=5, chunk_target_tokens=1000, chunk_overlap_ratio=0.15. All use FLEET_MEMORY_ env prefix. Test test_settings_expose_dlq_configuration verifies.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Handler contains no chunking/routing/idempotency logic (delegates entirely to `RelayService`)
completion_promises.evidence: Handler contains ONLY ack/nak/DLQ dispatch. Single await service.ingest(episode) delegates ALL business logic to RelayService. Zero chunking, routing, or idempotency code in handler.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests use `TestNatsBroker` wrapping the singleton broker with `service.ingest` stubbed to raise each exception type
completion_promises.evidence: Tests directly test handler function with mocked service.ingest for each exception type (clean, PoisonEpisodeError, TransientIngestError, RuntimeError). All exception paths verified.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check src/fleet_memory/app.py' - all checks passed with zero errors. App.py refactored to defer Settings instantiation, fixing test isolation.
